issues.name: docs_agentic_review
issues.likely_cause: The docs system is coherent, consistent with the positioning document, and free of hard-failure patterns. The README → START_HERE → docs/README journey is clean. Promoted next-click pages reinforce the same core story (simple Ralph-loop core, composable orchestration, strong default workflow, ambitious work, result-first evaluation). No top-level surface leaks artifacts, handoff plumbing, or internal process language as the main pitch.
